item.description:

BUSINESS ENQUIRIES- Contact 📧 info@ayejude.com
In this video, Aye Jude explains reports about an incident in the Indian Ocean near Sri Lanka, where an Iranian ship was attacked by America submarine, leading to a tragic loss of lives. Sri Lankan rescue teams reportedly recovered many bodies and saved several survivors during the rescue operation. U.S. Défense Secretary Pete Hegseth made strong remarks about American military power following the incident. The video also discusses how China is reacting to the growing conflict and the indirect warnings being sent to the United States. Meanwhile, debates are rising within the United States over decisions taken by Donald Trump, including tariff disputes and discussions around the Epstein files. As global tensions increase, will more countries step into the conflict or will diplomacy find a way to stop it?

item.title: Data to Dashboards: Power BI Live Session
item.description:
📊 Data to Dashboards – Power BI Live Session
In this session, we explored the fundamentals of Business Intelligence (BI) and how organizations transform raw data into meaningful insights using Power BI dashboards.
In today’s data-driven world, understanding how data is collected, processed, and visualized is an essential skill. Tools like Power BI help businesses turn raw data into interactive reports and dashboards that support better decision-making.
🔎 What you’ll learn in this session: • What is Business Intelligence (BI) • Benefits of BI in modern organizations • Data Collection from multiple sources • Understanding the ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) process • How raw data is converted into dashboards • Introduction to Power BI and data visualization

item.title: ⁉️How Politicians Will Take advantage of this | Sr journalist Suresh kochattil #telugupodcast
item.description:
In this engaging telugu podcast episode on lazymuscle and RRRshow, host Rohit Gollena speaks with guest Suresh Kochattil about realities that most people notice every day but rarely question. The conversation opens with an important message for viewers, setting the tone for a deep and honest discussion about what really happens behind common scenes we see on the streets. It feels like a direct talk with the audience, asking us to stop, observe, and think. They begin by breaking down how organized begging networks actually work. Instead of seeing begging as a random act, the episode explains how it is often structured and controlled by groups that profit from human suffering. From there, the discussion moves naturally into illegal human trade and exploitation, helping Telugu audiences understand how vulnerable people are trapped and used by these hidden systems. The aim is not just to shock, but to create awareness and empathy. The talk then shifts to public safety and everyday risks in city life, with references to incidents around Lumbini Park and Gokul Chat. These examples make the conversation feel close to home for Hyderabad viewers. It becomes less of a theory and more of a real-life warning about how crowded public places can become targets when crime networks operate freely. From there, the episode questions the punishment and justice system. Are punishments truly discouraging crime, or are they too weak to stop powerful networks? The guest and host discuss this in a simple, relatable way, as if talking to a friend who is confused about why crimes keep repeating. This naturally leads into how phone surveillance works and how authorities track calls and digital activity, helping viewers understand both the power and the limits of technology in fighting crime. The conversation also touches on Musi River pollution, not just as an environmental issue but as a result of deeper political and illegal activities. It explains how neglect, corruption, and hidden interests damage natural resources that affect millions of people. The discussion then moves to real estate scams and illegal networks, showing how land, money, and influence are tightly connected in India’s urban growth story. Hawala and underground money transfers are explained in a clear and simple way, so even first-time listeners can understand how black money moves without banks. This part of the telugu podcast is especially useful for young people, business owners, and professionals who want to stay away from risky financial traps and understand how illegal money systems work in real life. Towards the end, the mood becomes more personal. The guest shares the best advice he ever received, and then offers practical advice directly to viewers. It feels like a calm wrap-up after a heavy discussion, reminding everyone that awareness is the first step toward safety and change. If you follow rohith gollena and enjoy meaningful content from lazymuscle and RRRshow, this telugu podcast episode is made for you. It talks about crime, public safety, money systems, and environment in a way that feels like a conversation, not a lecture. Watch it fully to understand how hidden networks influence daily life and why informed citizens play a key role in building a safer society.
#telugupodcast #lazymuscle #rrrshow #rohithgollena #teluguinterviews #telugupodcastclips #indianpodcast #hyderabadpodcast #socialissuesindia #crimeawareness #begging #publicsafety #hawalasystem #blackmoneyindia #realestatescams #justiceandinjustice #phonetappingcase #musiriver #urbancrime #telugucontent #telugucreator #teluguyoutube #awarenesspodcast

item.title: TV Review: ‘Young Sherlock’
item.description: Arriving on Prime Video on March 4 is the latest attempt to bring Sir Arthur Conan Doyle’s Sherlock Holmes character to screens, ‘Young Sherlock.’ With director Guy Ritchie as part of the creative team, the show stars Hero Fiennes Tiffin (‘After’) as the titular detective, but at an earlier point of his life.

item.description:
Join this channel to get access to perks: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCq9kaXFyF2b6oXQ5veWdvog/join
BUSINESS ENQUIRIES- Contact 📧 info@ayejude.com
In this video, Aye Jude explains how tensions in the Middle East are rising after reports of Iranian attacks affecting several countries in the region. Donald Trump stated that the conflict could continue for several weeks and that the United States will not step back. The video also explains the concept of the “cost of war” and how prolonged conflicts affect economies and global stability. Some reports suggest that strategic locations in cities like Dubai and Doha could become sensitive points during the conflict. It also revisits last year’s tensions involving Iran, Israel, and the United States, including concerns about disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz and rising oil prices. The video also touches on the $2.6 billion uranium deal between India and Canada. With wars, trade, and energy routes all connected, could these tensions reshape the global economy?

In this video, Aye Jude explains reports of rising tensions involving NATO, as the conflict in the Middle East appears to widen. There are claims that Iran targeted the British Royal Air Base at RAF Akrotiri, though official confirmations remain limited. item.title: Going Dutch
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Going Dutch.

In Going Dutch a decorated, hard-ass colonel is tasked with running the least important U.S. Army base in the world, located in the tulip-hugging, wine-chugging Netherlands.

item.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite.

WarnerMedia announced today that it is partnering with All Elite Wrestling (AEW), the new professional wrestling promotion featuring a world-class roster of diverse male and female wrestlers, giving fans a new wrestling experience for the first time in 20 years. WarnerMedia and AEW together will build this powerhouse sporting league from the ground up and will begin airing weekly matches later this year. With this league, AEW is introducing a new generation of wrestlers to fans, offering fun, gripping and authentic athletic matches that will make wrestling more accessible to a broad audience.

item.description:
Join this channel to get access to perks: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCq9kaXFyF2b6oXQ5veWdvog/join
BUSINESS ENQUIRIES- Contact 📧 info@ayejude.com
In this video, Aye Jude explains reports of rising tensions in the Gulf region, including missile threats allegedly targeting areas in Dubai such as near the Burj Khalifa and Palm Jumeirah, though official confirmations remain limited. The discussion also covers claims that Iran is focusing on strategic and symbolic locations amid its conflict with the United States and Israel. Meanwhile, Kuwait confirmed that a U.S. F-15 fighter jet made an emergency landing, and the pilots were taken to hospital for treatment. Reports also mention drone activity near Saudi Arabia’s Ras Tanura oil refinery, raising global concerns. Saudi Arabia has warned it would retaliate if directly attacked. With energy routes and oil facilities under threat, could this crisis push global oil prices even higher?

item.title: 7 LEVELS Of Kubernetes You MUST-KNOW | Vishkha Sadhwani
item.description:
After working with real production clusters and mentoring learners, one pattern is clear: Kubernetes mastery is layered.
From core objects and debugging crash loops to GitOps, observability, and multi-cluster design, each stage builds on the previous one.
If you treat Kubernetes as a progression instead of a checklist, you stop memorizing YAML and start thinking like an architect. Master each level, and you become job-ready faster.
Follow me also on, Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vishakha.sadhwani LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vsadhwani/
Subscribe to my Newsletter: https://www.tech5ense.com/
-----------------------------------------------
🙋‍♀️ ABOUT ME
I’m Vishakha ☁️; A Cloud Architect and DevOps enthusiast who loves turning complex cloud concepts into simple, practical insights you can actually use. You’ll find real-world projects 💻 quick explainers ☕ and honest career advice 💬; From Kubernetes and Terraform to landing roles and building your tech brand, I keep things approachable, actionable, and a little fun so learning Cloud and DevOps actually feels exciting.
If this sounds like your vibe, hit subscribe, and let’s keep growing together 🚀

item.title: 🚨Whaaaat 🚨PAKISTAN DECLARES WAR ON INDIA | Aye Jude✊
item.description:
Join this channel to get access to perks: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCq9kaXFyF2b6oXQ5veWdvog/join
BUSINESS ENQUIRIES- Contact 📧 info@ayejude.com
In this video, Aye Jude explains the rising tensions between Pakistan and Afghanistan, following reports of cross-border clashes along the Durand Line. Pakistan’s Defence Minister Khawaja Muhammad Asif made strong statements on social media, accusing Afghanistan’s Taliban leadership of aligning with India. The situation reportedly escalated after cross-border incidents, with claims of civilian casualties in affected regions. The conflict traces back to long-standing disputes over the Durand Line and tensions that intensified after the Taliban returned to power in Afghanistan. Both sides have exchanged serious allegations, deepening mistrust between the two neighbours. With tensions rising, will this remain a border conflict and affect India?

item.title: I RISKED Everything ONLY For This | Vishakha Sadhwani
item.description:
When I landed in the US on a student visa, I didn’t have a plan. Just a loan, I had no idea how I’d repay. I was serving tables, sharing an apartment with five people, with only one goal in mind. To pay it all off.
From $8/hour assistantships to $21/hour internships… to my first full-time job, every step felt impossible until it wasn’t. That loan didn’t break me. It built me.
Subscribe for part 2!
-----------------------------------------------
🙋‍♀️ ABOUT ME
I’m Vishakha ☁️; A Cloud Architect and DevOps enthusiast who loves turning complex cloud concepts into simple, practical insights you can actually use. You’ll find real-world projects 💻 quick explainers ☕ and honest career advice 💬; From Kubernetes and Terraform to landing roles and building your tech brand, I keep things approachable, actionable, and a little fun so learning Cloud and DevOps actually feels exciting.
If this sounds like your vibe, hit subscribe, and let’s keep growing together 🚀
-----------------------------------------------
🏷️ TAGS vishakha sadhwani, life in usa, study in usa, us student visa, indian student in usa, student loan story, usa tech jobs, tech career, software engineer, cloud engineer, devops engineer, data engineer, ai engineer, nvidia, google, amazon, study abroad after graduation, how to land a job in usa from india, how to land a job at google, how to land a job abroad from india, tech career, immigrant jobs, programming, learn to code, tech jobs 2026, masters in usa, immigrant in usa

item.title: 🚨Pawan Vs Jagan BIG FIGHT ⚔️ On Tirumala Laddu ISSUE Again | Aye Jude✊
item.description:
Join this channel to get access to perks: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCq9kaXFyF2b6oXQ5veWdvog/join
BUSINESS ENQUIRIES- Contact 📧 info@ayejude.com
In this video, Aye Jude explains the perspective of Pawan Kalyan on the alleged ghee adulteration issue in the Tirumala Laddu. Referring to SIT reports, he questioned the opposition Y. S. Jagan Mohan Reddy and the previous administration over changes made in the Tirumala Tirupati Devasthanam board between 2022 and 2024. Pawan Kalyan claimed that key quality practices were altered during that period and raised concerns about the ingredients used in preparing the laddus. He also called upon Hindus to raise their voice if religious sentiments are hurt and questioned the timing of laddu distribution during major events like the Ayodhya inauguration. In his speech, he recited a poem symbolically addressing faith and accountability, which Aye Jude explains in detail. With no direct response yet from the opposition, how will this political debate unfold next?

item.title: 5 High-Paying Cloud Jobs In 2026 | Vishakha Sadhwani
item.description:
Vishakha Sadhwani: 5 High-Paying Cloud Jobs In 2026
Most people think “cloud” is just DevOps or basic infra. It’s not.
The real money is in roles that sit at the intersection of cloud, AI, security, and scale.
From engineers running LLMs in production, to SREs keeping massive platforms alive, to architects designing end-to-end AI systems, these jobs didn’t even exist a few years ago, and now companies can’t hire fast enough.
If you want roles that are future-proof, high-impact, and actually pay at the top of the market, these are the ones to watch.
I’ve broken down what they do, why they pay so much, and how to get there in a full-fledged video on my YouTube channel.
Follow me also on, Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vishakha.sadhwani LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vsadhwani/
Subscribe to my Newsletter: https://www.tech5ense.com/
-----------------------------------------------
🙋‍♀️ ABOUT ME
I’m Vishakha ☁️; A Cloud Architect and DevOps enthusiast who loves turning complex cloud concepts into simple, practical insights you can actually use. You’ll find real-world projects 💻 quick explainers ☕ and honest career advice 💬; From Kubernetes and Terraform to landing roles and building your tech brand, I keep things approachable, actionable, and a little fun so learning Cloud and DevOps actually feels exciting.
If this sounds like your vibe, hit subscribe, and let’s keep growing together 🚀
-----------------------------------------------

item.title: Top Skills For 2026 Cloud Jobs | DevOps vs SRE vs Cloud | Vishakha Sadhwani
item.description:
Check out Anyshift: https://www.anyshift.io/main
In this video, I've broken down the real difference between DevOps, Site Reliability Engineering (SRE), and Cloud Engineering in 2026, including how AI is changing each role, what hiring managers actually evaluate, and what makes you instantly hireable.
Most people think these roles are the same because they use similar tools like Linux, Kubernetes, CI/CD, Terraform, and cloud platforms like AWS, GCP, or Azure. But the responsibilities, interview expectations, failure handling, and AI impact are completely different. And, If you're also confused about which path to choose, this will give you a lot of clarity.
Subscribe for more content on cloud careers, AI infrastructure, DevOps interview prep, and getting hired in tech.
CHAPTERS: 00:00 Intro 00:56 Breakdown of The Video 01:42 DevOps 05:36 Site Reliability Engineer (SRE) 08:59 Anyshift - AI SRE 10:07 Cloud Engineer 13:21 Choose Your Suitable Job Role 14:01 Final Takeaway
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vishakha.sadhwani LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vsadhwani/
Subscribe to my Newsletter: https://www.tech5ense.com/
-----------------------------------------------
🙋‍♀️ ABOUT ME
I’m Vishakha ☁️; A Cloud Architect and DevOps enthusiast who loves turning complex cloud concepts into simple, practical insights you can actually use. You’ll find real-world projects 💻 quick explainers ☕ and honest career advice 💬; From Kubernetes and Terraform to landing roles and building your tech brand, I keep things approachable, actionable, and a little fun so learning Cloud and DevOps actually feels exciting.
If this sounds like your vibe, hit subscribe, and let’s keep growing together 🚀

item.description: Opening in theaters on February 13 is ‘Good Luck, Have Fun, Don’t Die’, a quirky new comedy sci-fi fable from director Gore Verbinski (‘Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl’), featuring Sam Rockwell as an unnamed man who bursts into a Los Angeles diner claiming to be from the future, and bringing a dire warning of impending dystopia.

item.title: 🚨INDIAN GIRL On The List ✊ | What Exactly Happened | Aye Jude✊
item.description:
Join this channel to get access to perks: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCq9kaXFyF2b6oXQ5veWdvog/join
BUSINESS ENQUIRIES- Contact 📧 info@ayejude.com
In this video, Aye Jude explains updates related to the Jeffrey Epstein files. Reports say the U.S. government has released around 3 million pages out of an estimated 6 million documents. The video discusses outreach to alleged victims and the legal process surrounding the released materials. It also mentions an email dated January 13, 2020, reportedly written after Epstein’s death, which has sparked online discussion, including claims involving an Indian national Girl though such claims remain unverified. The episode further explains issues like property disputes, document redactions, and how sensitive information is legally handled. With thousands of pages still unreleased, what truths are confirmed and what remains speculation?

item.title: 🚨This Is CINEMA🚨Supreme Court BLOCKS TRUMP’s Tarrifs | Aye Jude✊
item.description:
Join this channel to get access to perks: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCq9kaXFyF2b6oXQ5veWdvog/join
BUSINESS ENQUIRIES- Contact 📧 info@ayejude.com
In this video, Aye Jude explains the latest developments in the tariff battle led by Donald Trump, who has imposed heavy tariffs on several countries, including India. Reports say the Supreme Court of the United States questioned the legality of these tariffs and suggested refunds if found unlawful, which reportedly angered Trump. Some U.S. leaders claim the tariff on India is 10%, not 18%, while Trump also announced a temporary 10% blanket tariff for 150 days starting February 24. He stated that the U.S. has collected nearly $900 billion through global tariffs and also commented on Prime Minister Narendra Modi. Meanwhile, interim trade deal discussions between India and the U.S. are scheduled for February 24–26. With legal battles and negotiations unfolding, will this trade strategy strengthen America or reshape global alliances?

item.title: RAJASAAB POWERED BY MARUTHISAAB 🤡 | NUTSHELL ROAST 🔥
item.description:
👉 DESCRIPTION What was supposed to be mass entertainment turned into full rod experience.
In this video, I break down everything wrong with The RajaSaab from cringe scenes to confused writing and that “what did I just watch” feeling. And yes… we’re talking about Maruthi Saab too. Is this a comeback?
Watch till the end. It only gets worse.
⚠️ This is a roast. Just entertainment. Don’t take it personally.
No hate - Just honest reactions, sarcasm, and breakdown of what didn’t work. From screenplay to execution, let’s talk about how this film turned into… well… RodSaab.

item.title: ⚠️‼️ VERYYY IMPORTANT | UNKOWN SECRETS OF MEDICAL INDUSTRY | Ft Sudhakar Kancharla Telugu Podcast |
item.description:
To continue the research, do check this sheet: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1cvPvAr19sgcMswETXANcJSh4XG08hCd7n9l8k0HHc3A/edit?usp=sharing
Before marriages in India families sit together, horoscope charts and kundalis are compared, and futures are predicted and decided.
But rarely do we ask a far more tangible question: What do our health reports say?
What does the cell reveal about our fate? If your father has hair fall or diabetes, is it coincidence or inheritance? What does it mean when one says it “runs in the family”?
The answer lies in DNA (deoxyribonucleic acid), the biological blueprint that quietly shapes who we are. It influences whether we are tall or short, our eye color, our metabolism, our athletic potential, and even our susceptibility to conditions such as diabetes, cancer, and certain neurodevelopmental disorders like autism.
In this episode, we move the conversation from astrology to biology.
We sit down with Sudhakar Kancharla, founder of Yoda Diagnostics, one of India’s largest DNA diagnostics laboratories, to understand what our genes really reveal, and what they do not.
From the realities of at-home blood sample collection to the science behind genetic compatibility and inter-caste marriages, from Yoda’s DNA Decoder tests to the role of AI in predicting and preventing disease this conversation explores how data, diagnostics, and technology are reshaping healthcare in India.
Location and contact; Address: Yoda Diagnostics, Pillar No. C1427, Lal Bungalow, Ameerpet, Hyderabad, Telangana – 500016
Phone: +91 9135353535, 040-35353535
Email for Enquiries: customersupport@yodadiagnostics.com, helpdesk@yodadiagnostics.com
Maps Location: https://maps.app.goo.gl/xGxdfDEXihPh9612A
Website: https://www.mryoda.com
They also operate in the following locations: Tirupati Guntur Visakhapatnam Warangal Khammam Additionally, they have multiple centres across Hyderabad, including: Madhapur Miyapur LB Nagar . Disclaimer: This video is for educational purposes only. The opinions expressed by the guests are their personal views and do not reflect our stance. We have no intention of defaming or harming any individual, brand, product, country, or profession mentioned in this video. Our aim is to provide information to help the audience make informed decisions. ~ 00:00:00 Start 00:03:26 Blood and Diagnostic Testing 00:16:42 Quality of Blood Test 00:18:38 What to do if you get an inaccurate/wrong result? 00:25:13 What is DNA? 00:29:06 Price for the test at Yoda Diagnostics 00:30:07 Can DNA determine body’s athletic abilities 00:32:27 Autism and Neurodivergence 00:41:08 Importance of testing before marriage 00:42:56 Alarming finding? 00:45:02 Tests after conceiving a child 00:48:13 Personal story about his son 00:55:00 Testing for safety 00:57:50 Collaboration between Chiranjeevi garu and Yoda Diagnostics 01:02:02 Cancer 01:05:01 Insurance companies and DNA diagnostics 01:06:37 Intercaste marriages 01:08:24 DNA Decoder report and Mr. Yoda 01:13:11 Med-Match 01:17:09 Appreciation From CBN garu 01:26:36 Politics and electoral bonds 01:30:20 Vision for Yoda 01:34:43 His Story! ~

item.title: 8 YEARS Of Cloud & DevOps In 8 MINUTES (By An Ex-Google, Ex-Amazon Engineer) | Vishakha Sadhwani
item.description:
If you’re aiming for high paying jobs in Cloud, DevOps, AI, or Big Tech, this video is for you.
I’ve broken down my complete career roadmap, from Cloud Support at AWS, Cloud Architect at Google, and now, to Solutions Architect at NVIDIA.
I’ve shared practical career advice, the exact technical skills I built, certifications I used strategically, interview lessons I learned, and the decision-making frameworks that helped me grow inside Amazon, Google, and now NVIDIA.
This is real-world career growth, skill development, and long-term strategy for anyone serious about building a strong tech career. If you’re looking for career advice, motivation, personal growth, and clarity on how to build high-income skills in tech, this video will help you take smarter steps earlier in your journey.
CHAPTERS: 00:00 Intro 00:37 Life Recap 01:53 Level 1 02:55 Level 2 04:04 Level 3 05:25 Level 4 06:38 Level 5 08:05 Final Advice
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vishakha.sadhwani LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vsadhwani/
Subscribe to my Newsletter: https://www.tech5ense.com/

🙋‍♀️ ABOUT ME
I’m Vishakha ☁️; A Cloud Architect and DevOps enthusiast who loves turning complex cloud concepts into simple, practical insights you can actually use. You’ll find real-world projects 💻 quick explainers ☕ and honest career advice 💬; From Kubernetes and Terraform to landing roles and building your tech brand, I keep things approachable, actionable, and a little fun so learning Cloud and DevOps actually feels exciting.
If this sounds like your vibe, hit subscribe, and let’s keep growing together 🚀

item.title: Ai_classify in Databricks
item.description:
Try it for Free Here: https://bit.ly/aa-dbxfree
Get the Files here: https://github.com/AlexTheAnalyst/DatabricksIDP/tree/main/classify
IDP in Databricks is used to help speed up the process of transforming unstructured data into structured, usable data. It's not an easy process, but IDP makes it much easier!
IDP Documentation: https://www.databricks.com/blog/pdfs-production-announcing-state-art-document-intelligence-databricks ____________________________________________

item.title: Top 40 Google Cloud Services In 30 MINUTES [Full Guide]
item.description:
In this video, I've broken Google Cloud down in the simplest way possible, so you stop trying to memorize hundreds of services and actually learn what matters.
I used AWS for years, but when I had to prepare for GCP interviews in just one week, I realized something very quickly: he fundamentals don’t change, only the names and the way each cloud implements them.
I've built a 7-bucket system that covers almost everything you need to become Google Cloud literate, from the day-one setup and IAM to compute, containers, databases, networking, DevOps automation, AI and monitoring.
Along the way, I've also shared what to build every week so you’re not just watching, you’re actually building and retaining the skills.
And make sure you watch till the end because you'll get 3 portfolio project ideas to validate your knowledge andd add to your resume, plus 3 free certification paths that can strengthen your resume.
CHAPTERS: 00:00 Intro 01:40 Bucket 1 06:10 Bucket 2 11:14 Bucket 3 14:41 Bucket 4 18:49 Bucket 5 21:25 Bucket 6 25:00 Bucket 7 27:46 Projects 29:17 Conclusion

item.title: ❤️‍🔥India ka Dhurandhar's #telugupodcast #rrrshow #rohithgollena #indianarmy
item.description:
In this impactful telugu podcast episode on lazymuscle RRRshow, host Rohit Gollena brings an exclusive conversation with NSG Major General Ravi Ravada (Retd.), offering rare insights into India’s elite counter-terrorism force and the realities of modern warfare. This episode begins with a clear explanation of what is NSG, its role in national security, and why it is considered India’s ultimate tactical response unit for terror threats and hostage rescue missions. The discussion takes a deep dive into how NSG handled the Mumbai 26/11 attacks, covering operational planning, on-ground challenges, and lessons learned from one of the most complex counter-terror operations in Indian history. Major General Ravi Ravada explains the structure and purpose of the Black Tornado unit and the highly specialized 51 SAG, shedding light on how these commandos are trained to operate in high-risk urban environments. A powerful emotional segment focuses on Major Sandeep Unnikrishnan, the sofa associated with his final stand during 26/11, and the meaning of supreme sacrifice. This part of the telugu podcast reflects the emotional strength required by soldiers and the unseen cost paid by their families and comrades. The episode also explores the hardest NSG training routines and compares them with the even more demanding training of Indian PARA SF. From physical endurance to mental resilience, this conversation reveals why only the toughest soldiers qualify for elite forces. Major General Ravi Ravada shares experiences from missions he was involved in, leadership lessons from the battlefield, and decision-making under extreme pressure. Strategic national security topics such as the Uri surgical strike, ongoing issues at the India-China border, and evolving military threats are discussed in detail. Viewers will also learn about different types of weapons used in the Indian Army, the technological superiority and greatness of the BrahMos missile, and its importance in India’s defense doctrine. This rohith gollena hosted lazymuscle episode concludes with a discussion on the toughest emotional moment faced by a soldier, making this episode a must-watch telugu podcast for defense aspirants, patriotic youth, and anyone interested in India’s military power and real-life heroism.
#NSG #MajorGeneralRaviRavada #26_11Attacks #BlackTornado #51SAG #IndianSpecialForces #ParaSF #IndianArmy #BrahMos #UriSurgicalStrike #IndiaChinaBorder #DefensePodcast #TeluguPodcast #LazyMuscle #RRRshow #RohithGollena #operationsindoor #motivation #army #armylover #armystatus #armylife #armymotivation #nsg #nsgcommando #mumbaiattacks #26/11attacks #indianarmy #republicday #indianarmy #majorpodcast #teluguarmypodcast

item.title: Virtual Machines Vs Containers Vs Serverless Explained | Vishakha Sadhwani
item.description:
In this short, I’ll break down the actual difference between virtual machines, containers, and serverless in the easiest way.
“VMs vs Containers vs Serverless” is never a trick question. It’s a design question.
💻 Use VMs when full OS control and legacy dependencies matter. 📦 Use containers to ship microservices fast and scale them in seconds. 🌐 Go serverless when traffic is unpredictable, and speed matters more than servers.
Interviewers aren’t checking definitions; they’re checking whether you can match the workload to the architecture.
Follow me also on, Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vishakha.sadhwani LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vsadhwani/
Subscribe to my Newsletter: https://www.tech5ense.com/

item.title: 200+ AWS Services… But You Need Only THESE [Full Roadmap]
item.description:
AWS has 200+ services, but you only need to focus on the ones that power most real applications. I break everything into 7 buckets: from Foundation and Security, Compute and Containers, to even AI and Machine Learning.
This guide is very focused on learning by building. I'll also walk you through 7 portfolio projects that use services like IAM, S3, EC2, Lambda, API Gateway, DynamoDB, VPC, ALB, RDS, CDK, CloudWatch, and more, so keep watching till the end.
If you're prepare for internships or cloud roles, this video will give you a clear path, milestones, and a simple week-wise checklist to start ASAP!

item.title: OpenAI Reacts to Running Out of Money

item.title: LOVER BOYS ❤️🤣🤣🤣
item.description:
#shorts #ytshorts #incogshorts #playlikeincognito #youtubeshorts
👉 DESCRIPTION: This video is a Telugu roast on Nibba–Nibbi internet culture, which honestly is getting more out of control every day.
This is PART 3, made only because of viewer demand. Part 1 & 2 chusaruu & Comments lo part 3 adigaru. So… here we are. CAN’T STOP THEM.
This video is not about hating, targeting, or judging any individual’s personal life. The focus is on attention-seeking behaviour, cringe trends, and misleading content that gets normalised online and ends up influencing very young minds.
When relationships, breakups, clout chasing, and oversharing everything for views happen without maturity or guidance, it becomes a problem. This video talks about that issue using roast + commentary + humour.
If you’re watching only to abuse someone, you missed the point. If you’re watching to laugh and think a little, you’re in the right place.
⚠️ FAIR USE DISCLAIMER: This content falls under the Fair Use policy as defined by Section 107 of the Copyright Act of 1976. It is used for the purpose of criticism, comment, satire, education, and parody.
All clips, visuals, and references are heavily transformed with my own voiceover, commentary, humour, and visual edits.
This video does not aim to defame any individual or their work. It is created purely for discussion, awareness, and comedy.
⚠️ Clip Source: Twitter / Instagram / YouTube Meme Clips: Credits to respective meme pages. DM if any credit is missing.
Endscreen Song: https://www.instagram.com/venky_vritings_vlogs/ (Show some love ❤️❤️)
Video Credits: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IeGL7moxaZ0 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wV_1aH0aXWI

item.title: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms.

A century before the events of Game of Thrones, two unlikely heroes wandered Westeros: a young, naive but courageous knight, Ser Duncan the Tall, and his diminutive squire, Egg. Set in an age when the Targaryen line still holds the Iron Throne and the last dragon has not yet passed from living memory, great destinies, powerful foes, and dangerous exploits await these improbable and incomparable friends.

item.title: Star Trek: Starfleet Academy
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Star Trek: Starfleet Academy.

Star Trek: Starfleet Academy is set in the 32nd century, a time period in the far-future of the Star Trek franchise where Starfleet and the United Federation of Planets are recovering from a cataclysmic event, as depicted in Star Trek: Discovery. It introduces viewers to a young group of cadets who come together to pursue a common dream of hope and optimism. Under the watchful and demanding eyes of their instructors, they discover what it takes to become Starfleet officers as they navigate blossoming friendships, explosive rivalries, first loves and a new enemy that threatens both the Academy and the Federation itself.

item.title: FASTEST Way To Learn Python in 2026!
item.description:
Vishakha Sadhwani: FASTEST Way To Learn Python in 2026!
Cloud Python isn’t about algorithms or leetcode. It’s about automating infrastructure, integrating services, and handling failures at scale.
Variables manage configs and resource names. Loops help you operate across servers and buckets. Functions make automation reusable. Error handling saves you from flaky APIs. List comprehensions filter cloud resources fast. Libraries connect you to AWS, GCP, Azure, or OCI. API calls trigger workflows and fetch metrics. JSON parsing is how every cloud service communicates.
These concepts power most real-world cloud scripts.
Follow me also on, Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vishakha.sadhwani LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vsadhwani/
Subscribe to my Newsletter: https://www.tech5ense.com/
-----------------------------------------------
🙋‍♀️ ABOUT ME
I’m Vishakha ☁️; A Cloud Architect and DevOps enthusiast who loves turning complex cloud concepts into simple, practical insights you can actually use. You’ll find real-world projects 💻 quick explainers ☕ and honest career advice 💬; From Kubernetes and Terraform to landing roles and building your tech brand, I keep things approachable, actionable, and a little fun so learning Cloud and DevOps actually feels exciting.
If this sounds like your vibe, hit subscribe, and let’s keep growing together 🚀
-----------------------------------------------

item.title: RPA Power Automate First Session
RPA Power Automate First Session
Azure Data Engineering Demo for Beginners | Walkthrough
item.description:
In this Azure Data Engineering demo, we walk through an end-to-end mini project using real-world scenarios. You will learn how modern data pipelines are built on Microsoft Azure using core services like Azure Data Factory, Azure Databricks, Azure Synapse, and Azure Storage.
What you will learn: - Azure Data Engineering basics (ETL vs ELT, batch vs streaming) - Designing a simple data pipeline end-to-end - Ingesting data into Azure Data Lake Storage - Transformations using Azure Databricks / Spark - Loading data into a reporting/analytics layer - Best practices, tips and common interview points
Who is this for: - Freshers looking for Azure Data Engineer roles - Manual testers / support engineers planning to switch to data engineering - Working professionals moving from SQL / BI / On‑Prem to Azure - Anyone preparing for Azure Data Engineer interviews
Azure Data Engineering demo, Azure Data Engineer tutorial, Azure data pipeline project, Azure Data Factory, Azure Databricks, Azure Synapse, Azure Data Lake, data engineering for beginners, Azure data engineer for freshers, RPA Vault of Trainings
Subscribe to the channel for more step‑by‑step Azure Data Engineering, RPA and automation tutorials.

item.title: If I Started My Tech Career In 2026, I Would Do THIS | Vishakha Sadhwani
item.description:
Learning Resources: https://github.com/vishakhasadhwani/cloud-skills-roadmap
If I started my tech career in 2026, this is exactly how I’d do it.
The biggest problem today isn’t lack of guidance, it’s too much advice. Roadmaps, frameworks, certifications, checklists. Most of them look great on paper but completely fall apart when you see how real production systems work. Real environments are messy. Decisions are driven by cost, legacy systems, compliance, and trade-offs—not by chasing the latest cloud service.
So, I've broken down exactly how I’d become a Cloud Engineer in 2026 if I could start over. I focus on how companies actually run infrastructure today: on-prem, cloud, and hybrid. You’ll see why “cloud-native everything” is mostly a myth, why multi-cloud is common, and why understanding systems matters more than memorizing tools.
I walk through a practical, project-first roadmap, from local infrastructure and migrations to containers, multi-cloud deployments, hybrid AI setups, monitoring, CI/CD, and finally interview thinking, so keep watching till the end!
CHAPTERS: 00:00 Intro 01:30 Foundation Building 02:02 Week 1-2 03:34 Week 3-4 05:14 Week 5-8 07:42 Specialization 07:48 Week 1-4 09:01 Week 5-8 10:51 Week 9-12 12:21 Portfolio Building 12:47 Projects 13:56 Interview Preparation 15:06 Conclusion
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vishakha.sadhwani LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vsadhwani/
Subscribe to my Newsletter: https://www.tech5ense.com/
-----------------------------------------------
🙋‍♀️ ABOUT ME
I’m Vishakha ☁️; A Cloud Architect and DevOps enthusiast who loves turning complex cloud concepts into simple, practical insights you can actually use. You’ll find real-world projects 💻 quick explainers ☕ and honest career advice 💬; From Kubernetes and Terraform to landing roles and building your tech brand, I keep things approachable, actionable, and a little fun so learning Cloud and DevOps actually feels exciting.
If this sounds like your vibe, hit subscribe, and let’s keep growing together 🚀
-----------------------------------------------

item.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City.

The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City takes viewers into an undiscovered world that is about so much more than religion, although the Mormon church is undeniably engrained in the culture. In the majestic mountains of Utah is a hidden social circle made up of successful women who have created their own paradise filled with luxury homes, shopping sprees and multi-million-dollar businesses and brands. With Hollywood's exclusive Sundance Film Festival in their backyards, these Type-A power-brokers are accustomed to rubbing elbows with A-listers and what party list you are on means everything. They have mastered running wildly successful enterprises by day and enjoy après ski at the finest resorts by night, all the while raising extraordinary and unconventional families. Here perfection is not an aspiration, it's a mandate. They hold themselves and each other to an extremely high standard and never hold back when things go sideways, but lord knows they are always there for each other when they need it most.

item.title: Tracker
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Tracker.

Tracker features lone-wolf survivalist Colter Shaw, who roams the country as a "reward seeker," using his expert tracking skills to help private citizens and law enforcement to solve all manner of mysteries while contending with his own fractured family.

item.title: The War Between the Land and the Sea
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The War Between the Land and the Sea.

When a fearsome and ancient species emerges from the ocean, dramatically revealing themselves to humanity, an international crisis is triggered. With the entire population at risk, UNIT step into action as the land and sea wage war.

item.title: Spartacus: House of Ashur
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Spartacus: House of Ashur.

Spartacus: House of Ashur poses the question: What if Ashur hadn't died on Mount Vesuvius at the end of Spartacus: Vengeance? And what if he had been gifted the gladiator school once owned by Batiatus in return for aiding the Romans in killing Spartacus and ending the slave rebellion?

item.title: The Mighty Nein
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Mighty Nein.

The Mighty Nein follows a group of fugitives and outcasts, bound by secrets and scars. But when a powerful arcane relic known as "The Beacon" falls into dangerous hands, they must learn to work together to save the realm and stop reality itself from unraveling.

item.title: History's Greatest Mysteries
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: History's Greatest Mysteries.

History's Greatest Mysteries will investigate a wide range of historically compelling topics and the mysteries surrounding each including the Titanic, D.B. Cooper, Roswell, John Wilkes Booth, and more. Each program within the franchise will showcase fresh, new evidence and perspectives including never-before-released documents to the general public, personal diaries and DNA evidence to unearth brand-new information about these infamous and enigmatic chapters in history.

item.title: SpyxFamily
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: SpyxFamily.

Master spy Twilight is the best at what he does when it comes to going undercover on dangerous missions in the name of a better world. But when he receives the ultimate impossible assignment—get married and have a kid—he may finally be in over his head! Not one to depend on others, Twilight has his work cut out for him procuring both a wife and a child for his mission to infiltrate an elite private school. What he doesn't know is that the wife he's chosen is an assassin and the child he's adopted is a telepath!

item.title: Smiling Friends
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Smiling Friends.

Smiling Friends is a hit animated comedy co-created and starring Michael Cusack and Zach Hadel that follows the employees of a small company dedicated to bringing happiness to a bizarre yet colorful world.

item.title: Down Cemetery Road
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Down Cemetery Road.

When a house explodes in a quiet Oxford suburb and a girl disappears in the aftermath, neighbor Sarah Trafford becomes obsessed with finding her and enlists the help of private investigator Zoë Boehm. Zoë and Sarah suddenly find themselves in a complex conspiracy that reveals that people long believed dead are still among the living, while the living are fast joining the dead.

item.title: Anne's Rice Talamasca: The Secret Order
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Anne's Rice Talamasca: The Secret Order.

Anne Rice's Talamasca: The Secret Order focuses on a secretive society called the Talamasca, comprised of the men and women responsible for tracking and containing the witches, vampires, and other creatures scattered around the globe.

item.title: 9-1-1: Nashville
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: 9-1-1: Nashville.

A high-octane procedural about heroic first responders, as well as their family saga of power and glamour set in one of America's most diverse and dynamic cities.

item.title: Boston Blue
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Boston Blue.

In Boston Blue, NYPD Detective Danny Reagan takes a position with Boston PD. Once in Boston, he is paired with Detective Lena Silver, the eldest daughter of a prominent law enforcement family.

item.title: Robin Hood
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Robin Hood.

Robin Hood is described as a sweeping, romantic adventure, a modern take of the classic tale that brings historical authenticity, psychological depth, and a heightened focus on the relationship between Rob and Marian.

In the series, following the Norman invasion of England, Rob – a Saxon forester's son – and Marian, the daughter of a Norman lord – fall in love and work together to fight for justice and freedom. As Rob rises as the leader of a band of rebel outlaws, Marian infiltrates the power at court, as both work together to thwart royal corruption and bring peace to the land.

item.title: Sheriff Country
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Sheriff Country.

Sheriff Country focuses on straight-shooting sheriff Mickey Fox, the stepsister of Cal Fire's division chief Sharon Leone, who investigates criminal activity as she patrols the streets of small-town Edgewater while contending with her ex-con father, Wes, who is an off-the-grid marijuana grower, and a mysterious incident involving her wayward daughter.

item.title: Pluribus
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Pluribus.

The most miserable person on Earth must save the world from happiness.

item.title: The Last Frontier
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Last Frontier.

When a prison transport plane suspiciously crashes near a rugged Alaskan town, the region's U.S. marshal ignites a manhunt for dozens of violent inmates—and the criminal mastermind he believes is behind it all.

item.title: IT: Welcome to Derry
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: IT: Welcome to Derry.

Taking place in the ‘60s, the show explores the origins of the curse that would haunt the small Maine town for the next 27 years — as well as the origin story of Pennywise the Clown.
